intro.name: Muhammad Nadeem
intro.about: Associate Cloud Engineer with 1+ years of experience in designing, developing, and maintaining cloud-based applications. AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner, demonstrating my understanding of the fundamental concepts of AWS and my ability to navigate the AWS Management Console, understand AWS security measures, and define the benefits of cloud computing. Strong skills in Python, Flask, and other programming languages. Experience with cloud security, networking, and storage. Excellent problem-solving and troubleshooting skills.

education.schoolName: Punjab University College of information Technology, Lahore
Punjab University College of information Technology, Lahore

projects.title: Full Elastic and robust Wordpress Deployment
projects.skills: Elastic Load Balancing · Amazon VPC · AWS Auto Scaling · Terraform · Amazon Relational Database Service (RDS) · Amazon Route 53 · Amazon S3 · Amazon EC2
projects.summary: Hosted and deployed WordPress in fully elastic manner using AWS core services like EC2, RDS and Route 53.
